---
title: "get_layer() Demo"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(terra)
library(sf)

devtools::load_all()
```

```{r}
library(terra)
library(sf)

devtools::load_all()



## Santa Barbara AOI


sb_bbox <- c(
  -120.0, 34.3,
  -119.5, 34.7
)

wri_sb <- get_layer(
  id = "WRI_score",
  aoi = sb_bbox,
  aoi_crs = "EPSG:4326"
)


plot(
  wri_sb,
  main = "WRI Score - Santa Barbara"
)


## California AOI


ca_bbox <- c(
  -124.5, 32.5,
  -114.0, 42.0
)

wri_ca <- get_layer(
  id = "WRI_score",
  aoi = ca_bbox,
  aoi_crs = "EPSG:4326"
)


plot(
  wri_ca,
  main = "WRI Score - California"
)
```
